hero.title: Tokenize Your Skin
hero.subtitle: Deposit your P250 Sand Dune (Minimal Wear) — receive an ERC-20 token on Sepolia. Burn the token — get your skin back.

inventory.title: Your Inventory
inventory.empty: No P250 Sand Dune (Minimal Wear) skins available
inventory.private: Your Steam inventory is private. Change it to public in Steam settings.

trade_panel.title: Deposit
trade_panel.empty: Click on skins to select for deposit
trade_panel.status_sent: Trade offer sent — accept it in the Steam app

withdraw_modal.title: Withdraw Skins
withdraw_modal.trade_url_info: Trade offer will be sent to your saved Steam Trade URL
withdraw_modal.status_sending: Bot is sending your skin(s) — accept the trade in Steam
withdraw_modal.no_tokens: You have no tokens to withdraw

trade_url.label: Set up your Steam Trade URL to view inventory
trade_url.hint: Required to send trade offers. Found in Steam → Profile → Trade offers.

errors.metamask_not_found: MetaMask not found. Please install it.
errors.not_logged_in: Please sign in with Steam first
